MINI MINUTES: Defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company's Motion to Select Mediation as Form of ADR is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Case is ordered scheduled for Jury Trial on 7/25/2011 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel or Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to obtain answer or enter default against Defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Co., is ordered off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Court ordered case scheduled for Case Management Conference on 7/30/2010 at 9:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Ntc And Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN LARSEN, TEL. NO. 298-3356 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LISA NICOL, TEL. NO. 621-3200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss Action IS DENIED, CASE IS NOW AT ISSUE AND READY TO GO FORWARD. MR. LARSEN TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
